{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603220852042CCD57F5E17C726DD09A"}"},"total":2257},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7347138316406768446","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"不错不错，和我玩的方舟生存进化三国第5季一样，哈哈都有龙，各种各样的，有计谋，毁号战，龙战，升级，进化龙等等，龙特效比很多玄幻国漫特效强不少……"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1710643086,"group_id":"7169086532962225159","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"真常之道，悟者自得，得悟道者，常清净矣。
 上士无争，下士好争；上德不德，下德执德。
执著之者，不名道德。众生所以不得真道者，为有妄心。既有妄心，即惊其神；","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N699iMqg0HE7x+xmmGxjd5w=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p9-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/40e59c1364dc4510b78e8129e0e80779~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776709985&x-signature=WfloLJiBl7i4UZcZLqTLZmbfbRw%3D","user_id":"103586632039","user_name":"玖曦神帝"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"103586632039","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7169086532962225159","book_info":{"abstract":"陆沉穿越到了一个平行世界，而这里与他前世不同的是龙国历史资料缺失严重，历代名臣将相竟无人知晓！
恰巧这时，国运擂台降临，让历代名将进行擂台对擂！
胜者，可以获得奖励，甚至名将复活！
败者，国土沦陷，为奴为仆！
而龙国因不识历代名将，连战连败！
